name: forgecad
description: Code-first parametric CAD for JavaScript/TypeScript, in the browser and CLI.

scripts.build: tsc && vite build && npm run build:cli
scripts.dev:cli: tsup cli/forgecad.ts --format esm --platform node --target node20 --out-dir dist-cli --sourcemap --external typescript
scripts.build:cli: tsup cli/forgecad.ts --format esm --platform node --target node20 --out-dir dist-cli --clean --sourcemap --external typescript
scripts.test: npm run test:prepare && node dist-cli/forgecad.js check suite
scripts.test:compiler: npm run test:prepare && node dist-cli/forgecad.js check compiler
scripts.test:compiler:update: npm run test:prepare && node dist-cli/forgecad.js check compiler --update
scripts.test:query-propagation: npm run test:prepare && node dist-cli/forgecad.js check query-propagation
scripts.test:query-propagation:update: npm run test:prepare && node dist-cli/forgecad.js check query-propagation --update
scripts.test:examples: npm run test:prepare && node dist-cli/forgecad.js check examples
scripts.test:brep: npm run test:prepare && node dist-cli/forgecad.js check brep
scripts.test:api: npm run test:prepare && node dist-cli/forgecad.js check api
scripts.test:text: npm run test:prepare && node dist-cli/forgecad.js check text
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run build:skill:forgecad
